arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Ruben Amorim 'quickly' makes 32-year-old transfer decision
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is reportedly ready to do away with experienced midfielder Christian Eriksen in the summer of 2025.

arts.ttl: Adidas Manchester United 2025 'Late 2000s' Retro Collection Leaked
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can leak the special Manchester United 2025 retro collection, which features a design inspired by the Adidas kits of the late 2000s and is expected to be released at the end of the 24-25 season.

arts.sum: Man United will be going in search of their first Premier League win under Ruben Amorim against Everton on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd flop issues cry for help after Amorim criticism
arts.sum: Italian media outlets have been all over Zirkzee's situation at Man Utd and Gazzetta dello Sport now once again mentions the Dutchman in connection with Juventus, coached by his former Bologna boss Thiago Motta. Joshua Zirkzee is ready to leave Manchester United as early as January, according to Italian media.

arts.ttl: Ineos demand, personal promise, player meetings - Inside Ruben Amorim's Man United
arts.sum: Manchester United are at the beginning of a new era and Ruben Amorim is confident he is the man to bring success back to Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes bizarre Man United claim as he reveals what will have 'shocked' Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: The former Arsenal star has questioned Manchester United's ability to move to Ruben Amorim's preferred 3-4-3 formation.

arts.sum: Barca were stunned on their own turf...
